headline: Production-engineering techniques broke out across the quarter as infrastructure reliability and retrieval moved to the front.
body: The window's sharpest rotation is a cluster of production-engineering breakouts: vector search and HNSW alongside new entrants in retry mechanisms, elastic compute, control plane, error handling, deterministic behavior, and debugging, signaling attention shifting from model capability to operational reliability and retrieval. Memory infrastructure advanced on two fronts, with the Open Memory Protocol offering a unified store across Claude, ChatGPT, and Curso and Microsoft Research's Memora separating storage from retrieval for scalable context management. Model scaling continued through LongCat-2.0, a 1.6T-parameter Mixture of Experts with 48B active, while Base44 began rolling out its own model as vibe coding platforms chase defensibility. Lagging code-generation and task-decomposition techniques held high ratios but flat momentum.

cited_items.title: Vibe coding platform Base44 launches own model as AI startups seek defensibility
LongCat-2.0, a large-scale MoE model with 1.6T total and 48B Active
Open Memory Protocol – One Memory Store for Claude, ChatGPT, Curso
Memora: A Harmonic Memory Representation Balancing Abstraction and Specificity
